_notes: Prompts for generating Happy Class website imagery via KIE AI (Nano Banana Pro). Each entry keyed by output filename (without extension). Aesthetic locked from Sandra's 2026-04 direction: dark premium masculine, black shiny gold-embossed box, charcoal/grayscale base, single gold accent, intimate without being sexual.
_style_bible: Editorial luxury product + lifestyle photography. Palette: matte black (#0A0A0A), charcoal (#1A1A1A), graphite (#2A2A2A), warm mid gray, bone (#E8E6E1), single accent of warm antique gold (#C9A96E). Low-key cinematic lighting , single warm directional source, deep shadows, soft fall-off, never flat or washed out. Surfaces: black lacquer, deep walnut, dark stone, raw linen in shades of stone/bone, brushed metal. Pink and blue paper cards appear as deep dusty rose (#9B6B72) and slate storm blue (#5A6F84) , muted, tactile, premium stationery, never pastel. Mood: confident, refined, intimate, not soft. Think Aesop / Le Labo / Loewe campaign photography, NOT lifestyle stock. No people unless specified. No watercolor. No bright pastels. No visible legible text , wordmarks are abstract or out of focus.

hero.prompt: Editorial luxury product photography, wide cinematic composition with depth and motion. A matte black lacquered box sits open on a dark walnut wood surface, lid leaning at an angle behind it. Contents are arranged with intentional asymmetry, scattered as if mid-use: a stack of deep dusty-rose cards spills slightly out of the box on one side, a single muted slate storm-blue card lies askew across the table beside it (showing soft cotton-paper texture and a small abstract gold-foil corner mark, no readable text), a brass-bodied fountain pen rests on a diagonal, and a thin coil of gold-foil ribbon sits to the side. The lid wordmark in antique gold foil catches a single highlight. Lighting: dramatic single warm tungsten source from upper right rakes hard across the scene, picking up the satin sheen of the lacquer, the gold foil, and the texture of the cards, throwing the rest into deep velvety shadow. Dust motes visible in the warm light beam. Composition: scene anchored to the right two-thirds of the frame, generous deep-shadow negative space to the left for headline overlay. Edges of the frame fall into near-black. Cinematic, alive, intimate, dramatic. Aesop / Loewe / Le Labo campaign aesthetic. Medium format aesthetic, shallow depth of field, fine grain. No people. No legible text. Color palette: matte black, charcoal, deep walnut, antique gold, dusty rose, slate blue.

product-kit.prompt: Editorial luxury product photography, overhead three-quarter view. A matte black lacquered box sits open on a dark stone surface, lid resting at an angle behind it. Inside the box, two neat stacks of premium uncoated cardstock are visible: a stack of deep dusty-rose cards on the left, a stack of muted slate storm-blue cards on the right. A single brass-bodied fountain pen rests diagonally across the box edge. The lid shows a small abstract circular wordmark in antique gold foil, embossed. A thin gold-foil ribbon, almost imperceptible, lies coiled to the side. Lighting: single warm directional source from the upper left, deep falloff into shadow, soft highlights on the lacquer and the gold foil. The cards have visible cotton-paper texture and a single small gold-foil corner mark. No visible legible text. Background: charcoal stone with subtle natural grain, fading to near-black at edges. Mood: heirloom, considered, expensive without shouting. Loewe-meets-Aesop product photography. Shallow depth of field, medium format film aesthetic.

vignette-couch.prompt: Cinematic editorial lifestyle photograph. Low-key interior scene: a closed matte black lacquered box rests on a charcoal linen-upholstered side table next to a deep cognac leather lounge chair, in the corner of a dimly-lit modern apartment. The wordmark on the lid catches a single highlight of antique-gold foil. A heavy crystal tumbler with a finger of dark amber whisky sits beside the box. A single warm reading lamp throws a tight pool of light across the scene; the rest of the room recedes into deep shadow. Tonal palette: black, charcoal, deep cognac brown, brushed brass, warm tungsten amber. Composition: low angle, slightly off-center, generous shadow space. Mood: solitary, considered, masculine refinement. No people in frame. No legible text. Shot on medium format, fine grain, shallow depth of field. Aesop / Loewe interiors campaign aesthetic.

vignette-coffee.prompt: Cinematic editorial photograph, overhead view, slight three-quarter angle. A mixed-race couple's hands meet across a dark walnut table, fingers gently overlapping or just touching. One hand has rich dark-brown skin with subtle warmth, the other has lighter olive-tan skin. Both hands look natural and grown-up: visible wrists, one wearing a slim leather watch with a brass case. Between and around their hands: two heavy black ceramic espresso cups (faint steam), a single deep dusty-rose card and a single muted slate storm-blue card slightly overlapping with small abstract gold-foil corner marks (no readable text), and a brass-bodied pen at an angle. Lighting: single warm window light from the left, deep shadow falloff to the right, soft highlights on the porcelain, pen, and the warmth of the skin tones. Background: dark wood fading to black. Tonal palette: black, charcoal, dusty rose, slate blue, antique gold, espresso brown, warm skin. Mood: intimate, restrained, grown-up, tender without being sentimental. No faces. No legible text. Editorial luxury photography, medium format aesthetic, fine grain, shallow depth of field.

vignette-walk.prompt: Cinematic editorial photograph. A white man's hands, fingers visible, hold the closed matte black lacquered box at chest height in front of a charcoal cashmere sweater. Fair skin tone, well-kept hands suggesting his late 30s to 50s, capable and refined. The box wordmark in antique gold foil catches a soft highlight. The man's face and shoulders are out of frame above; one wrist shows the edge of a leather watch strap and a hint of brass case. Lighting: single warm directional source from upper left, deep falloff, soft shadow under the box. Background: out-of-focus dark interior with a hint of warm wood paneling. Tonal palette: black, charcoal cashmere gray, antique gold, warm walnut. Composition: tight, intimate, hands-and-object focal point. Mood: grounded, considered, no performance. No face. No legible text. Editorial luxury photography, fine grain, shallow depth of field.

paper-pink.prompt: Editorial macro photograph, overhead view. A single deep dusty-rose card of premium cotton-paper cardstock rests at a slight angle on a charcoal linen background with visible weave texture. The card shows a small abstract gold-foil corner mark in the upper-left, no letters, no readable text. A brass-bodied pen casts a soft diagonal shadow across the lower edge. Lighting: single warm directional source from upper left, deep soft shadow, gentle falloff. Tonal palette: deep dusty rose (#9B6B72), charcoal linen, antique gold, near-black. Tactile, intimate, beautifully restrained. No watercolor, no pastel, no soft warmth , premium dark-editorial mood. Medium format aesthetic, shallow depth of field, fine grain.

Lighting: single warm directional source from upper left, deep soft shadow, gentle falloff. Tonal palette: muted slate storm blue (#5A6F84), charcoal linen, antique gold, near-black. paper-both.prompt: Editorial macro photograph, overhead view. Two cards of premium cotton-paper cardstock overlap casually on a charcoal linen background with visible weave texture: a deep dusty-rose card underneath, a muted slate storm-blue card angled on top. Both show small abstract gold-foil corner marks, no letters, no readable text. A brass-bodied pen rests diagonally between them. Lighting: single warm directional source from upper left, deep soft shadow, gentle falloff, soft highlights on the gold foil. Tonal palette: deep dusty rose, muted slate storm blue, charcoal linen, antique gold, near-black. Tactile, intimate, restrained. Premium dark editorial photography , no pastel, no watercolor. Medium format aesthetic, shallow depth of field, fine grain.

social-proof.prompt: Editorial cinematic photograph, masculine-leaning composition. An East Asian man's hand, visible from the wrist, rests on a dark walnut table holding a muted slate storm-blue cotton-paper card between thumb and index finger. His skin tone is warm light-tan, hand looking refined and grown-up (late 30s to 50s). The wrist shows a thin leather watch strap with a brass case. Beside his hand: a heavy black ceramic mug of black coffee, a brass-bodied pen, and the matte black lacquered box (closed) with its antique-gold foil wordmark catching a single highlight. Lighting: single warm window light from the left, soft falloff into deep shadow on the right. Background: out-of-focus dark interior with hints of warm wood and charcoal. Tonal palette: black, charcoal, slate blue, walnut, antique gold, warm tungsten. Composition: hand and box anchor the lower third, generous negative dark space above. Mood: grounded, considered, premium without ostentation. No face in frame. No legible text. Medium format editorial aesthetic, fine grain, shallow depth of field.

sandra-portrait.prompt: Editorial portrait photograph in the style of a luxury brand campaign , Loewe, Aesop, The Row aesthetic. Use the reference photo to render the same woman: confident American woman in her early fifties, long dark-brown hair with subtle warm auburn highlights falling past her shoulders, warm intelligent expression, rectangular tortoise-shell reading glasses, gold chain necklace with a small pendant. Replace the wardrobe with a simple charcoal cashmere knit. Background: deep near-black with a hint of warm rim light suggesting an interior. Lighting: single warm directional key light from the upper left, soft shadow on the right side of her face, gentle catchlight in her glasses, faint warm rim light tracing her hair from behind. Skin rendered with natural texture, soft fine grain. Tonal palette: black, charcoal, warm bone, antique gold, warm skin tones. Composition: head-and-shoulders, slightly off-center, looking just past the camera with a quiet half-smile. Mood: assured, refined, present. Medium format editorial portraiture, shallow depth of field, no retouching look. Keep her facial features clearly recognizable as the woman in the reference photo. No legible text.
